description: CBL TRUNC(BIN) directive auto-detected from source — COMP variable keeps full binary range
notes: CBL TRUNC(BIN) at top of source should be auto-detected by parse_cbl_process_options(). PIC S9(4) COMP holds 9999+1=10000 without modulo under BIN mode. No explicit trunc_mode in JSON — runner must pick it up from the .cbl file.
